title: K8s Pod Resources vs SKU Capacity
description: Monitors Kubernetes pod resource requests, limits, and actual usage against configurable SKU capacity with violation detection. Units are configurable per resource type.

list.name: sku_memory_value
list.label: SKU: Total Memory (in selected unit below)
list.description: Enter the SKU memory capacity in the same unit as the Memory Unit selector

list.name: memory_unit
list.label: Memory Display Unit
list.query: GiB (binary\, 2^30 bytes) : 1073741824, MiB (binary\, 2^20 bytes) : 1048576, TiB (binary\, 2^40 bytes) : 1099511627776, GB (decimal\, 10^9 bytes) : 1000000000, MB (decimal\, 10^6 bytes) : 1000000, TB (decimal\, 10^12 bytes) : 1000000000000, Bytes (raw) : 1
list.description: Choose the unit for memory display. SKU Memory value must be entered in this same unit.

list.name: sku_ephemeral_value
list.label: SKU: Total Ephemeral Storage (in selected unit below)
list.description: Enter the SKU ephemeral storage capacity in the same unit as the Ephemeral Unit selector

list.name: ephemeral_unit
list.label: Ephemeral Storage Display Unit
list.query: GiB (binary\, 2^30 bytes) : 1073741824, MiB (binary\, 2^20 bytes) : 1048576, TiB (binary\, 2^40 bytes) : 1099511627776, GB (decimal\, 10^9 bytes) : 1000000000, MB (decimal\, 10^6 bytes) : 1000000, TB (decimal\, 10^12 bytes) : 1000000000000, Bytes (raw) : 1
list.description: Choose the unit for ephemeral storage display. SKU Ephemeral value must be entered in this same unit.

panels.title: CPU - SKU Status
panels.description: Shows whether total cpu requests exceed the configured SKU capacity

panels.title: Memory - SKU Status
panels.description: Shows whether total memory requests exceed the configured SKU capacity

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - SKU Status
panels.description: Shows whether total ephemeral storage requests exceed the configured SKU capacity

panels.title: SKU Capacity Utilization
panels.description: Percentage of each SKU dimension consumed by pod requests

panels.title: Total Running Pods
panels.description: Number of running pods in the selected namespace

panels.title: All Pods - Resource Requests and Limits
panels.description: Sortable table of all pods showing CPU (cores), memory, and ephemeral storage requests and limits. The footer row shows the sum.

panels.title: CPU - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Grouped bar chart showing cpu requests and limits for each running pod

panels.title: CPU - Capacity vs SKU
panels.description: Gauge showing what percentage of the configured CPU SKU capacity is consumed by total requests

panels.title: CPU - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total cpu requests, limits, and configured SKU capacity

panels.title: CPU - Aggregate Requests and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Historical trend of total cpu requests and limits vs the configured SKU threshold (red dashed line)

panels.title: CPU - Request Size Distribution
panels.description: Histogram showing the distribution of per-pod cpu request sizes

panels.title: CPU - Per-Pod Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Each pod's actual cpu usage (solid line) compared to its request (dashed) and limit (dotted). Pods where the solid line exceeds the dashed/dotted line are over-consuming.

panels.title: CPU - Pods Exceeding Their Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual cpu usage exceeds their configured request or limit. These pods are consuming more than allocated and may cause resource contention.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

(sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

panels.title: Memory - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Grouped bar chart showing memory requests and limits for each running pod

panels.title: Memory - Capacity vs SKU
panels.description: Gauge showing what percentage of the configured Memory SKU capacity is consumed by total requests

panels.title: Memory - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total memory requests, limits, and configured SKU capacity

panels.title: Memory - Aggregate Requests and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Historical trend of total memory requests and limits vs the configured SKU threshold (red dashed line)

panels.title: Memory - Request Size Distribution
panels.description: Histogram showing the distribution of per-pod memory request sizes

panels.title: Memory - Per-Pod Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Each pod's actual memory usage (solid line) compared to its request (dashed) and limit (dotted). Pods where the solid line exceeds the dashed/dotted line are over-consuming.

panels.title: Memory - Pods Exceeding Their Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual memory usage exceeds their configured request or limit. These pods are consuming more than allocated and may cause resource contention.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Grouped bar chart showing ephemeral storage requests and limits for each running pod

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Capacity vs SKU
panels.description: Gauge showing what percentage of the configured Ephemeral Storage SKU capacity is consumed by total requests

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total ephemeral storage requests, limits, and configured SKU capacity

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Aggregate Requests and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Historical trend of total ephemeral storage requests and limits vs the configured SKU threshold (red dashed line)

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Request Size Distribution
panels.description: Histogram showing the distribution of per-pod ephemeral storage request sizes

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Per-Pod Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Each pod's actual ephemeral storage usage (solid line) compared to its request (dashed) and limit (dotted). Pods where the solid line exceeds the dashed/dotted line are over-consuming.

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage - Pods Exceeding Their Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual ephemeral storage usage exceeds their configured request or limit. These pods are consuming more than allocated and may cause resource contention.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $ephemeral_unit - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $ephemeral_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $ephemeral_unit - sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $ephemeral_unit) > 0
